narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: रूस की इस हरकत से छिड़ जाएगा विश्व युद्ध? आगबबूला हुआ अमेरिका; फ्रांस ने भी कहा- अब खैर नहीं

narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries, specifically the US, for their handling of the situation and implies that they are not taking sufficient action to stop Russia's aggression.
